text.title: Lean Stack Bootstrapper Blueprint Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Lean Stack Bootstrapper Blueprint output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: services populated with a typed value
monthly_cost_ceiling populated with a typed value
alert_thresholds populated with a typed value
upgrade_triggers populated with a typed value
review_date populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
